caption: The video captures a professional discussion between two men seated at a table during an event labeled "#BigDataSV 2015." The man on the left, dressed in a dark suit and white shirt, sits with his hands clasped, attentively listening to the other speaker. The man on the right, wearing a gray suit and tie, is actively engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. Both individuals have laptops in front of them, suggesting they are referencing or presenting information related to the topic of big data. The setting appears formal, with a backdrop featuring logos and hashtags associated with the event, indicating a structured and focused dialogue on technological advancements in data management.
